confirmedRuntimeClaims.claim: JMOA full P2 confirmed a public no-CDS PetClinic memory win under EXPLODED_BOOT_APP.
V2-E confirmed an incremental PetClinic runtime win over full P2 using the LVT/LVTT reducer.
confirmedRuntimeClaims.comparison: full P2 vs full P2 + V2-E reducer
confirmedRuntimeClaims.claimBoundary: Confirmed for the earlier V2-E reducer policy used in v0.7.0; not automatically transferable to the V2-F hardened reducer.

confirmedRuntimeClaims.claim: V2-I confirmed an incremental PetClinic runtime win over full P2 using the explicit raw LVT/LVTT reducer engine.
confirmedRuntimeClaims.comparison: full P2 vs full P2 + V2-I raw reducer
confirmedRuntimeClaims.runtimeScope: EXPLODED_BOOT_APP, NO_CDS_LOW_DIRTY, MALLOC_ARENA_MAX=1, no CDS/AppCDS/Leyden/javaagent, jmoa.reducer.engine=raw
confirmedRuntimeClaims.claimBoundary: Confirmed only for the explicit raw engine under the PetClinic no-CDS exploded Boot protocol; not transferable to Doctor, fat-JAR, CDS/AppCDS, startup, or cross-service claims.

confirmedRuntimeClaims.claim: V2-K confirmed an incremental Doctor runtime win for raw-reduced D2R over corrected D2.
confirmedRuntimeClaims.comparison: D2 + fresh current-runtime D2 CDS vs D2R + fresh D2R CDS
confirmedRuntimeClaims.runtimeScope: SPRING_BOOT_FAT_JAR, CDS, variant-specific CDS archives, Java 26 container runtime, no javaagent, no class-load logging during memory pairs
confirmedRuntimeClaims.claimBoundary: Private Doctor runtime confirmation only; not public-reproducible and not transferable to all fat-JAR/CDS deployments or startup performance.

confirmedRuntimeClaims.claim: V2-L confirmed the productized raw LVT/LVTT reducer on a second public runtime target.
confirmedRuntimeClaims.comparison: public visits baseline vs the same baseline plus raw reducer
confirmedRuntimeClaims.runtimeScope: EXPLODED_BOOT_APP, NO_CDS_LOW_DIRTY, MALLOC_ARENA_MAX=1, no CDS/AppCDS/Leyden/javaagent, embedded HSQLDB, jmoa.reducer.engine=raw
confirmedRuntimeClaims.claimBoundary: Public visits-service baseline-plus-reducer confirmation only; no visits full-P2, startup, fat-JAR/CDS, all-PetClinic, or universal Spring Boot claim.

productCapabilities.claim: V2-M provides a report-only reducer admission and recommendation Maven goal with exact-protocol scope enforcement.
V2-N provides a report-only runtime-policy recommendation Maven goal with exact registry matching and CDS artifact/archive mismatch protection.
V2-Q admits only ordinary packaged application classes to opt-in raw LVT/LVTT reduction with generated/proxy families blocked or report-only.

artifactOnlyClaims.claim: V2-F reduces PetClinic dependency jar footprint under the hardened JAR safety policy.
V2-F reduces Doctor corrected D2 dependency jar footprint at artifact level.
V2-G materializes Doctor corrected D2 plus the V2-E reducer at artifact level.
V2-H screened the V2-F-hardened PetClinic reducer and did not promote it to runtime confirmation.
V2-I materializes the raw reducer into the PetClinic exploded Boot dependency layer.
V2-J processes Doctor corrected D2 dependency libs with the raw reducer and per-class byte-preservation auditing.
V2-K locally materializes Doctor corrected D2 plus raw reducer dependency libs.
V2-L materializes the productized raw reducer into the public visits-service exploded Boot dependency layer.

notClaimed: all Spring PetClinic or Spring Boot services
automatic reducer mutation from a V2-M recommendation
transfer of a recommendation to a different service, launch mode, or runtime policy
automatic runtime policy application from a V2-N recommendation
CDS archive reuse across artifact variants
transfer of CDS evidence to no-CDS or no-CDS evidence to CDS
